full_text:
Zhang Jin (Ziyun) 張津 (子雲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Jin (張津), styledZiyun (子雲), was born in Nanyang. Practised magic, sent to oppose Liu Biao, he was killed by his officer Ou Jing. Zhang Jin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Jin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
